name: TRA_TRD_locus_chr14q11
description: T-cell receptor alpha (TRA) and delta (TRD) locus on chromosome 14q11.2. TRA spans ~1 Mb with ~50 functional V-alpha and ~60 J-alpha gene segments; TRD is nested within TRA between V-alpha and J-alpha clusters. V(D)J recombination scrambles the locus per T-cell clone, similar to IGH/IGK/IGL.

architecture.internal_structure: 5' V-alpha cluster (~50 functional Vs) -> embedded TRD (Vd, Dd, Jd, Cd) -> J-alpha cluster (~60 Js) -> C-alpha. V(D)J recombination irreversibly deletes intervening DNA per T-cell clone.
